facebook.content: "The upcoming season of spiritual acceleration is not just about individual breakthroughs, but about the alignment of our lives with the will of God. As we prepare to shift into a higher gear, our choices will determine whether we'll be propelled forward or held back by the weight of unresolved issues. In this week's Kingdom Report, we'll be sharing an exclusive teaching on the 7 Critical Decisions That Will Determine Your Place in the Coming Move of God.
